programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In New York, Maria turns part of her home into an apartment for her grandson-but everything unravels when a negligent tenant living under the same roof as her, refuses to vacate; after barricading the door and cutting off access to her own space, Flash and his team face the escalating battle.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: A young couple in Philadelphia lists their home for sale, only to find a squatter already living in it; when confronted by Flash's team, he is completely shocked and produces a fraudulent lease; but can Flash see through the scam and help the homeowners take back what's rightfully theirs?

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular

programme.title: Joni Table Talk

programme.title: Storage Wars Texas
programme.desc: In the town of DeSoto, Victor scores a find and rushes to the fire department; Jenny obtains some old furniture; tension between the women boils over.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy takes on a supervisory role in Stanton, and it leads him to a bit of Slavic success; Brandi tries to help Danielle outfit her new apartment; Lisa gambles on a painting.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy gambles on his own party locker; Brandi and Jarrod return to basics; Rene receives advice on his presentation.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers battle in Rancho Cucamonga, Calif.; Dave Hester arrives in a truck large enough to fit his ego; Jarrod and Brandi obtain a vintage mask; Barry Weiss scores with a rock 'n' roll legend.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Brandi is fired up about expanding her brand in San Bernardino; Rene is positive that everyone is out to get him; Dusty tackles a locker dustier than him.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In Lakewood, Calif., Darrell and Brandon buy a locker fit for a fiesta; Dave acts like a bully; Barry pays a price for his locker addiction.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Back in Montebello, Gunter comes along to help Rene, who won't give him the time of day; Darrell tries to make Kimber his queen; Ivy and his boys Rochambeau their way to solid showing.

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: A K9 unit tracks a copper thief through punishing wetlands; a deputy gets a lucky escape after a gunman triggers a tense standoff; a suspect tries to make a watery getaway, and a dramatic car chase in Georgia leads to a surprising discovery.

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: In Florida, troopers risk life and limb wading through gator-infested swamps to track a suspect; a thief in Georgia is close to becoming gator feed to evade capture; a man acting erratically makes a surprising getaway and a gator comes between a woman and her pizza.

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: In Georgia, a crazed driver slams into a patrol car before escaping into swamp woods; deputies brave Florida's treacherous wetlands at night to track down an invisible fugitive; patrol officers chase a kayaker living on a derelict houseboat among the mangroves and in Louisiana, there's a snake alert!

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: A deputy and his K9 wade through the murky waters of a Georgia swamp to catch a submerged felon; in Louisiana's Cajun country, a suspect escapes into a gator-filled bayou; a man accused of armed robbery takes the plunge, and a deputy dons his heroic cape to save a drowning pup.

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: A suspect dives into open water and vanishes into the mangroves; in Texas, a chase ends in a swampy manhunt as officers call in reinforcements after suspects bail and disappear into the swampland; an armed arson suspect sparks an 11-hour standoff... high up in a tree.

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: Deep in the swamps of the southern USA, a suspect swings through the trees in a desperate bid to avoid capture; a man crashes into marshland, sparking a grueling 14-hour manhunt; and in Texas, officers face an even bigger threat, as a 10-foot alligator requires some serious wrangling.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A look at some strange arrests from across the country, police battle with a man in a bulldozer; an influencer live streams a break-in during a hurricane; a man dons a kids' mascot costume to dodge authorities; and more!

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A man drives through a store hours after having trashed it; a Florida neighborhood falls victim to shocking deliveries; a beachgoer causes mayhem after breaking free from a police car.
